name: World of Hyatt Credit Card
effective_cost: Low if you actually book the free night awards

verdict.text: Keep if you stay at Hyatt hotels — the free nights are the whole card

earn_rates.category: Restaurants, airline tickets (direct), local transit/commuting, fitness clubs & gyms

earn_note: The 4× hotel rate is Hyatt-direct only — book through an OTA and you earn nothing extra. The 2× bucket (dining, direct airfare, transit, gyms) is broader than most hotel cards' second tier, but 1× on general spend is well below a flat-rate card.

redemption_options.method: Transfer to airline miles (5:2 ratio, ~25 airlines)

points.note: World of Hyatt is routinely the highest-valued major hotel currency per point — NerdWallet pegged it around 1.8¢ in 2026. A new five-tier award chart (up from three tiers) rolled out in May 2026 and pushed most redemptions to cost more points than before, so treat 1.8¢ as a median, not a floor. Transferring out to airlines at 5:2 is a rounding error by comparison.

transfer_partners.highlight: World of Hyatt transfers to roughly 25 airline partners at a 5:2 ratio (5,000 Hyatt points → 2,000 miles), with a few better ratios like Virgin Atlantic (5:3) and Aeromexico (5:4) — but cashing out to airlines is rarely a good trade for a currency this strong at hotels.
transfer_partners.recent_changes: No changes to the airline transfer chart itself; the May 2026 award chart overhaul affects in-program hotel redemptions, not transfers.

credits.name: Annual Free Night Award
credits.subtitle: Category 1–4 · after cardmember anniversary
credits.description: One free night award each year after your cardmember anniversary month, redeemable at Category 1–4 Hyatt hotels and resorts (room charge only; resort/facility fees are waived). Excludes Miraval, Hyatt Zilara, and Hyatt Ziva.
tips: Valid for 12 months from issuance and subject to availability — book ahead, especially at popular Category 4 properties.
$200 here is a conservative mid-range estimate for a Category 1–4 redemption, not a guarantee for any specific hotel.

credits.name: Second Free Night Award
credits.subtitle: Category 1–4 · after $15,000/yr spend
credits.description: An additional free night award at Category 1–4 Hyatt properties after spending $15,000 on the card within a calendar year.
tips: Only worth counting if you're already going to hit $15,000/yr in spend — don't chase the threshold just for this.

credits.name: DoorDash DashPass + Credit
credits.subtitle: 12-mo complimentary + $10/mo non-restaurant · thru 2027
credits.description: Complimentary 12-month DashPass membership (covers DoorDash and Caviar, waives delivery fees) plus up to $10 off per month on non-restaurant DoorDash orders, both active through December 31, 2027.
tips: Requires activation through Chase's benefit portal — it doesn't turn on automatically.
Set the slider toward $0 if you're not already a regular DoorDash user.

insurance.detail: Theft & collision damage, secondary to personal insurance in the US
Not stated in card terms — no dedicated trip delay benefit found

protection_note: Respectable mid-tier protections for a $95 fee — trip cancellation, baggage, and rental car coverage are all present. Purchase protection tops out at just $500/item, and there's no dedicated trip delay benefit (separate from baggage delay), both well below premium travel cards.
rental_note: Rental coverage is secondary in the US and covers theft/collision only, not liability — decline the counter's CDW to use it, but put rentals on a card with primary coverage if you rent often.

status_perks.name: World of Hyatt Discoverist Status
status_perks.note: Complimentary with the card — includes a welcome amenity, free in-room WiFi, and 5 Elite Night Credits/year automatically, plus 2 more for every $5,000 spent. Discoverist is Hyatt's entry-level tier, well below Explorist/Globalist.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: Zero FX fees on international spend.

services.name: Visa Signature Concierge
services.detail: Complimentary 24/7 concierge for reservations, tickets, and travel arrangements.

additional_cards.title: Additional Cards

benefits.text: Earns World of Hyatt points on their spend (into your account)
Does not get their own Discoverist status, Elite Night Credits, or Free Night Award

additional_cards.note: Additional cards are free — a way to pool household spend toward the $15,000 threshold for the second free night.

timeline.text: World of Hyatt program moved from a 3-tier to a 5-tier award chart, pushing most in-program point redemptions higher. The card's free night awards (capped at Category 1–4) are affected the same way — expect less headroom than before at popular properties.
